workstreamName: One-card-per-opportunity board and recoverable operator deletion
operatorOutcome: The Acquisitions board is a comprehensible Kanban board where each opportunity appears once, card-level blockers do not create duplicate lanes, Lead-to-Deal is a state change, and the owner can trash and restore an unwanted card.

requirements.text: Each opportunity has exactly one active Kanban card; parcel verification, research state, and discovery gaps are visible card-level status, not duplicate board placement.
The board uses owner-comprehensible operating stages and a Lead becoming a Deal remains the same canonical opportunity.
The owner can move a lead to recoverable Trash and restore it; ordinary deletion does not destroy related operating evidence.
Address/APN duplicate candidates are surfaced for review while distinct parcels are never silently merged.

steps: Confirm a known opportunity appears in exactly one active lane
Create an isolated QA lead and confirm it appears once
Move it through a lifecycle transition without duplication
Refresh and restart and confirm persistence

requiredVisibleOutcomes: Must NOT occur: one opportunity renders in multiple active lanes
Must NOT occur: parcel verification creates a separate board card
Must NOT occur: a card is permanently lost by ordinary delete
Must NOT occur: trash/restore fails after restart
Must NOT occur: operator cannot identify the next business stage
mandate: Actively attempt to prove the implementation wrong; never repeat the builder's conclusions.
Open the actual running localhost dashboard in a real browser.
Navigate the full affected workflow; click every relevant control and open every affected tab.
Exercise relevant forms, maps, filters, tables, links, and actions.
Compare visible frontend output with API responses and, when appropriate, database records.
Compare visible output with accepted operator facts.
Refresh the browser and verify persistence; when restart persistence is required, restart via npm run landos:restart and reopen the workflow.
Capture fresh screenshots and exact reproduction steps for every failure.
Judge business meaning and operator usability, not merely whether pages load.
Return a non-passing result whenever an internally fixable issue remains.
After repairs, run the exact same journey again.
